type_definitions.name: render_type_graph_flat
type_definitions.description: Renderer function for a flat (non-clustered) mermaid type graph from a TypeGraph. Modified by D1 (receiver-less method edge coverage: params + returns), D2 (trait method scanning: collect_edges() is shared between flat and clustered renderers, so D2's graph.trait_names() loop affects flat output as well — trait_method_return / trait_method_param edges appear in flat output; the trait-node cluster insertion (IN-05) is a cluster-plan concern specific to the clustered renderer and does not apply to flat mode), and D3 (linkStyle gray coloring for argument-derived edges plus render_edge_symbol dispatch for new 4-value edge_kind). The function signature is unchanged; only the mermaid output content changes.

type_definitions.name: render_type_graph_clustered
type_definitions.description: Renderer function for a per-cluster mermaid block from a TypeGraph. Modified by D1 (receiver-less associated function edge coverage: both params and returns sides), D2 (trait method scanning: adds graph.trait_names() loop so trait methods' params and returns generate edges; also handles the case where EdgeSet::Methods alone is called without Impls so trait nodes are explicitly inserted into the cluster), and D3 (render_edge_symbol dispatch extended to 4-value edge_kind; linkStyle <idx>,... stroke:#888; appended for argument-derived edges). Signature unchanged; output mermaid content changes.

type_definitions.name: render_type_graph_overview
type_definitions.description: Renderer function for the cluster overview mermaid diagram. The function code itself is not directly modified by D1/D2/D3 (hence action=reference); only collect_edges() and render_edge_symbol() change. However, D1/D2 expand collect_edges() so the edge content produced by the rendering pipeline — including overview — will reflect the additional receiver-less-method and trait-method edges introduced by D1/D2. OS-03 explicitly restricts D3 linkStyle coloring to clustered and flat only: overview aggregates cross-cluster edges without per-edge indices, so the argument-derived edge color distinction (--o / linkStyle) is not applied to overview. The overview signature and call site are unchanged.

type_definitions.name: EdgeSet
type_definitions.description: Enum selecting which edge types to include in a mermaid type graph render (Methods / Fields / Impls / All). Not structurally changed by this track: no new enum variants are added. The behavioral expansion (receiver-less methods + trait methods + argument-derived edges) is a change to collect_edges() internals, not to the EdgeSet variant set. Docstrings for the Methods variant will be updated to reflect the expanded edge coverage, but the variant names and count are stable.
